profile_prompt_templates.balanced-full: Policy profile balanced-full: use Hakim full mode; reuse first, prefer stdlib/native behavior, make the smallest safe diff, preserve safety, and keep claims evidence-bound.
profile_prompt_templates.read-only: Policy profile read-only: inspect only the requested scope; do not create, modify, delete, format, or stage repository files, including ignored/generated files; explicitly report that no mutation occurred.
profile_prompt_templates.ultra-minimal: Policy profile ultra-minimal: use Hakim ultra mode; challenge additions, prefer deletion, and require evidence before abstractions or dependencies while preserving safety.
profile_prompt_templates.disabled: Policy profile disabled: use Hakim off mode; do not apply or claim Hakim prescriptive evaluation for this request.
